message:
Replace assert!(false, ...) with panic!() in conformance tests

Replace two instances of the anti-pattern `assert!(false, msg); fallback`
with direct `panic!(msg)` in build_renderable(). This is cleaner because:
- The assert!(false) pattern is flagged by clippy as unnecessary
- The unreachable fallback return after assert!(false) was dead code
- panic!() makes the intent explicit and removes the dead code paths

Affected: unsupported control operations and unsupported kind branches
in tests/conformance_python.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
